# Easy Guacamole

Serves: 4

## Ingredients

- 3 ripe avocados
- 1 lime, juiced
- 1 tsp salt
- 0.5 cup diced onion
- 3 tbsp fresh coriander, chopped
- 2 roma tomatoes, diced
- 1 tsp minced garlic
- 1 pinch of ground cumin

## Method

1. Mash avocados in a bowl. Stir in lime juice and salt. Mix in onion, coriander, tomatoes, and garlic. Add cumin. Refrigerate for 1 hour for best flavour.
